title: hydrangea corylifolia
intro: Hydrangea corylifolia, also known as the Chinese hydrangea or Hydrangea root, is a plant species native to East Asia and belongs to the family Hydrangeaceae. The roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea corylifolia include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and swelling, and supporting kidney function, making it a popular herbal remedy for urinary tract infections and kidney stones. Hydrangea corylifolia is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
